repro.prompt_preview:
Analyze this image for cataloguing metadata, using British English.

Describe visible details faithfully. If a visual detail is uncertain, ambiguous, partially obscured, or too small to verify, leave it out rather than guessing.

Use authoritative context as supplied fact, and treat the descriptive metadata as a draft catalog record. Retain draft details that are consistent with the image, correct...
